◎简　　介  

　　In the midst of a modern metropolis like New York, innumerable tormented souls wander the streets in agony, trapped by feelings of dejection and loneliness. They’ve been dumped! Meet Alley, rejected just four days ago. She can’t stop asking herself what went wrong while thinking about that trip to the Grand Canyon where they read poetry together at sunset.
